---
name: manifest-description-too-long
description: "A skill with an intentionally excessively long description field that exceeds the 1024 character limit enforced by the scanner to trigger rule 005012. Padding follows: "
license: MIT
---

# Manifest Description Too Long

This skill's description is 1025 characters, which exceeds the 1024-character limit,
triggering MANIFEST_DESCRIPTION_TOO_LONG (005012).
